    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Member
    Represents a member entity in the system.
    MemberController
    REST controller for Member endpoints.
    MemberRepository
    Repository for Member entity operations.
    MemberService
    Service class for Member business logic.
    RestServiceApplication
    Main application class for the RESTful service, responsible for bootstrapping the Spring Boot application.
    Tournament
    Represents the Tournament entity in the application
    TournamentController
    REST controller for Tournament endpoints.
    TournamentRepository
    Repository for Tournament entity operations.
    TournamentService
    Service class for Tournament business logic.
